record.text: 火花が散る瞬間だけが目に入る。じゃが千年分の目には、その前の石集めがちゃんと見えておるのじゃ！

千年で何度も聞いた。「なぜあの時に気づいたのか」を。

答えはたいてい同じじゃよ——「あの時」だから気づいたのではない。あの時に初めて、石が揃っただけじゃ。

道具に罪はない。Copilot Keyboardは育てていく価値のあるアプリじゃ。

じゃがの、「革命」は千年使い古されたことばでの。

活版印刷もタイプライターも、「革命」と呼ばれたのは後からじゃった。使った時は「おお、便利じゃ」くらいでのう。

先に「革命」と叫ぶ道具と、使い続けた末にそうだったと気づく道具。千年の勝率は、後者が圧倒的じゃぞ！

value.text:
I believe morale issues have less to do with layoffs, which have been ongoing since 2022, but instead that big tech employees are now seen as a cost center to reduce via automation not valuable talent to hoard.

That realization, essentially a backlash to the Great Resignation, is creating despair.

record.text: Microsoft Defender Now Automatically Isolates Compromised Devices to Stop Ransomware Spread

external.description:
Microsoft Defender for Endpoint has introduced automatic device isolation, a proactive containment capability that disconnects compromised workstations from the network the moment a high-confidence attack is detected without waiting for human intervention. 



 Microsoft Defender for Endpoint can now automatically isolate compromised devices as part of its broader Automatic Attack Disruption framework. 



 When the platform identifies an active ransomware campaign or sophisticated intrusion in progress, it immediately severs the affected device’s network connections, cutting off the attacker’s access while preserving the device’s communication channel with the Defender for Endpoint service itself. 



 This means security analysts continue to receive telemetry and maintain visibility into the compromised machine even while it is isolated. 



 The capability targets end-user workstations that are onboarded and managed by Microsoft Defender for Endpoint. It does not apply to servers or unmanaged devices under the current scope of this feature. 



 How Automatic Attack Disruption Works 



 Microsoft Defender XDR correlates millions of signals across endpoints, identities, email, and SaaS applications to build a single, high-confidence incident view. 



 Once an active attack, such as ransomware propagation or Business Email Compromise (BEC) credential harvesting, is confirmed with sufficient confidence, the system automatically triggers containment actions at the incident level, not just the alert level. 



 For device isolation specifically, Defender for Endpoint disconnects the compromised asset from the broader network, preventing the attacker from using it as a launchpad for lateral movement, data exfiltration, or ransomware deployment to adjacent systems. 



 Isolation based on Ransomware Attack 



 The isolation is scoped to specific devices involved in the incident, not broadly applied across the environment, minimizing collateral disruption to business operations. 



 Microsoft has embedded several safeguards to prevent isolation from becoming an operational bottleneck: 



 
 Time-limited containment: Isolation is automatically reversed after a defined time window, ensuring devices are not permanently cut off. 



 Operator override: Security teams can manually release isolation at any point after completing investigation and remediation steps. 



 Scoped targeting: Only devices directly implicated in the attack chain are isolated, not the entire environment. 



 Exclusion support: Organizations can configure exclusion rules for critical business machines, ensuring that high-priority assets use selective isolation based on defined rules rather than full network disconnection. 
 



 After automatic isolation is applied , security operators can audit the full activity trail directly in the Microsoft Defender portal. record.text: Microsoft SharePoint Server Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks

external.description:
Microsoft has disclosed a critical security vulnerability in SharePoint Server that could allow authenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code remotely across multiple versions of the platform. 



 Tracked as CVE-2026-45659 and released on May 21, 2026, the flaw poses a significant risk to organizations running on-premises SharePoint deployments. 



 The vulnerability stems from the deserialization of untrusted data within Microsoft Office SharePoint. When exploited, it enables a network-based attacker to remotely execute code on the affected server. 



 Microsoft rated the flaw as Important severity, with exploitation currently assessed as “Exploitation Less Likely” — though the low complexity of the attack makes it a notable threat worth immediate attention. 



 What makes this flaw particularly concerning is its low barrier to exploitation. Any authenticated user with a minimum of Site Member-level permissions can trigger the vulnerability; no administrative or elevated privileges are required. 



 The attack vector is network-based (AV:N) with low attack complexity (AC:L), meaning an attacker needs no specialized prior knowledge of the target system and can achieve repeatable, reliable exploitation from the internet. 



 Affected Versions and Patches 



 Microsoft has released security updates for all affected SharePoint Server versions. Organizations should prioritize patching immediately. 



 Product KB Article Build Number SharePoint Server Subscription Edition KB 5002863 16.0.19725.20280 SharePoint Server 2019 KB 5002870 16.0.10417.20128 SharePoint Enterprise Server 2016 KB 5002868 16.0.5552.1002 



 Mitigations 



 Security teams should take the following steps immediately: 



 
 Apply the May 21, 2026, security updates for all affected SharePoint versions via the Microsoft Update Catalog or direct download 



 Audit site membership permissions and restrict Site Member access to trusted users only 



 Monitor SharePoint Server logs for unusual deserialization activity or unexpected code execution attempts 



 Isolate internet-facing SharePoint instances until patches are confirmed as applied 



 Consider enabling Web Application Firewall (WAF) rules to detect and block malicious deserialization payloads 
 



 Although Microsoft currently confirms the vulnerability has not been publicly disclosed or actively exploited, the low complexity and network-accessible attack surface make it a prime candidate for future exploitation once proof-of-concept code circulates. 



 Organizations relying on SharePoint for internal collaboration, document management, or external portals face elevated exposure if patches are delayed. Security teams are strongly encouraged to treat this as a priority patching event within their next maintenance window.

external.description: In a world filled with expensive wellness supplements promising everything from better skin to improved mood, raw honey stands out as a natural, accessible option with genuine health potential. Unlike many processed supplements, high-quality raw honey retains its natural enzymes, antioxidants, and antibacterial properties because it is not subjected to high-heat pasteurization. These compounds contribute to better digestion, faster wound healing, and anti-inflammatory effects thanks to polyphenols that protect cells from damage. Some studies even suggest potential anticancer properties through interactions with cell-signaling pathways, though more research is needed. Local honey offers additional benefits for allergy sufferers. By containing trace amounts of regional pollen, it may help desensitize the body to environmental triggers, similar to an allergy shot, reducing nasal symptoms. Organic honey aims for purity by avoiding synthetic pesticides and antibiotics, but certification can be challenging due to bees foraging over wide areas. The U.S. Department of Agriculture does not certify domestic honey as organic for this reason, meaning many organic-labeled products are imported. Quality matters greatly, as even raw honey can contain traces of chemicals like glyphosate if bees forage near treated areas. Elden Foods distinguishes itself through rigorous batch testing for purity, enzyme activity, moisture, and contaminants. Based in Kaysville, Utah, the company partners with top beekeepers worldwide to offer raw, local, and organic varieties such as Yucatán-sourced honey, creamed honey, and wild sage honey. Customer reviews highlight its superior taste and cleanliness compared to other brands. While honey is not a cure-all, choosing high-quality raw honey from transparent sources provides a tasty, nutrient-rich addition to a healthy lifestyle that outperforms many overhyped supplements.
external.title: Health Benefits of Raw, Local Honey as a Natural Alternative to Supplements

record.text:
Cardiologist Raises Concerns About Trump's Sleep Issues and Overall Health Ahead of Medical Checkup

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Users: It's clickbait ⚠️

#donaldtrump #healthconcerns #whitehouse 

View full AI summary:

external.description:
A Raw Story report highlights comments made by Dr. Jonathan Reiner, a cardiologist and former physician to Vice President Dick Cheney, regarding President Donald Trump’s health ahead of a scheduled medical and dental examination at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. Reiner expressed concern that the White House has not provided detailed or transparent information about the president’s physical and mental condition despite visible signs that, in his view, warrant further explanation.

Among the issues discussed were bruising on Trump’s hands, swelling in his ankles, and signs of fatigue during public appearances. Reiner questioned earlier explanations from the White House, including claims that bruising was caused by frequent handshaking and that ankle swelling was related to chronic venous insufficiency. He argued that some symptoms appeared more recent and potentially more serious than previously described.

The physician also focused heavily on what he described as possible sleep-related problems. According to Reiner, Trump frequently appears tired during daytime events and has allegedly fallen asleep during meetings and ceremonies. He suggested these behaviors could indicate chronic insomnia or daytime somnolence, conditions that may increase risks associated with aging, including cardiovascular disease, cognitive decline, depression, anxiety, and dementia.

Reiner emphasized that presidents should face more consistent health transparency requirements similar to those imposed on professionals in safety-sensitive positions such as pilots and law enforcement personnel. He stated that the public deserves reassurance that the commander in chief is physically and mentally fit for duty.

The article notes that Reiner has become one of the more visible medical commentators publicly questioning Trump’s fitness for office in recent years.
external.title: Cardiologist Raises Concerns About Trump's Sleep Issues and Overall Health Ahead of Medical Checkup

record.text:
Republican voter approval of Trump declines sharply on inflation and gas prices, polling shows

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Users: It's clickbait ⚠️

#trumpapproval #inflation #republicanvoters 

View full AI summary:

external.description:
A recent analysis highlighted a notable decline in President Donald Trump’s approval ratings among Republican voters, particularly regarding key economic issues such as inflation and gas prices. According to polling data discussed by CNN analyst Harry Enten, Trump’s standing on inflation has shifted dramatically compared to his 2024 re-election period. At that time, Republicans viewed his handling of inflation very favorably, with a net approval rating of about +68 points. However, more recent polling indicates that this figure has fallen into negative territory, reaching approximately -5 points in some surveys, including Ipsos data, with similar trends appearing in Fox-related polling.

The decline is not limited to inflation alone. Gas prices, another major concern for voters, have also shown a steep drop in approval among Republicans. Where Trump previously held a strong positive rating of around +51 on fuel prices last summer, current figures place him at roughly -4, representing a significant 55-point shift. Analysts attribute this change in part to rising fuel costs and broader inflationary pressures, which have become increasingly salient for households.

Economic concerns remain the dominant issue for Republican voters, with a clear majority identifying the cost of living and inflation as their top priorities. Despite having campaigned on lowering living costs, Trump’s approval on these issues has weakened even within his own party. The analysis suggests growing frustration among Republican voters over everyday economic pressures, indicating a notable erosion of support on issues central to the administration’s political messaging.
external.title: Republican voter approval of Trump declines sharply on inflation and gas prices, polling shows

Where Trump previously held a strong positive rating of around +51 on fuel prices last summer, current figures place him at roughly -4, representing a significant 55-point shift. Analysts attribute this change in part to rising fuel costs and broader inflationary pressures, which have become increasingly salient for households.

Economic concerns remain the dominant issue for Republican voters, with a clear majority identifying the cost of living and inflation as their top priorities. Despite having campaigned on lowering living costs, Trump’s approval on these issues has weakened even within his own party. The analysis suggests growing frustration among Republican voters over everyday economic pressures, indicating a notable erosion of support on issues central to the administration’s political messaging.

record.text: Odesa authorities fortify city with trenches, bunkers, and barriers to deter Russian attacks #Ukraine

external.description:
Authorities in Odesa are building fortifications around the city in preparation for a circular defense, according to the regional territorial defense administration. A video posted by the administration shows the installation of reinforced razor wire, known as “Egoza,” being laid across fields and even along the seabed or riverbeds. The footage details how Odesa officials are strengthening defenses in the south. 
 Local authorities have clarified that the construction of these defensive structures is not in response to an imminent breakthrough by Russian forces, but rather to ensure that such an event never occurs. The video on the territorial defense administration’s Facebook page notes that around the city, workers are digging multi-kilometer anti-tank trenches, building bunkers, and installing concrete “dragon’s teeth” and barbed wire to create what is described as a “kill zone.” 
 The 30-second video shows excavators digging up to two meters deep in open fields, with people in both military and civilian clothing setting up barbed wire as plains, shorelines, and a bay or river appear in the background. The footage also reveals the “Egoza” being submerged underwater and other types of barbed wire stretching around Odesa. The narration emphasizes that the city is being prepared to repel a possible tank assault. 
 “Odesa is being prepared for an all-around defense. The construction of multi-kilometer anti-tank trenches and bunkers around the city is nearing completion, with ‘Egoza,’ ‘dragon’s teeth,’ and tangled obstacles being installed,” the video explains. 
 The territorial defense forces referenced the Latin phrase, “If you want peace, prepare for war,” rephrasing it as, “If you want peace, prepare your kill zone in advance.” They stress that these preparations are not bravado, but preemptive work to make clear to Russian forces that any attempt at a landing will not succeed. 
 Authorities did not specify where exactly the new fortifications are being constructed-whether along the southern coastline or on the border with Moldova’s breakaway region of Transnistria, where Russian troops are stationed. 
 There is currently no information about the construction of defensive structures or preparations for circular defense on the Telegram channels of Odesa city administrator Serhiy Lysak or regional chief Oleh Kiper. Meanwhile, the Facebook page of the Southern Defense Forces reports ongoing combat operations, recording 21 Russian attacks in the past day-most near Zaporizhzhia, with only two near the Antonivsky Bridge in Kherson. Activity in Odesa was recently reported by the Ukrainian Air Force, which noted the latest strike on the night of May 26, when a high-speed target approached the city. 
 Earlier in May, a representative of Ukrainian forces and the Ukrainian Volunteer Army, Serhiy Bratchuk, told media that there is “potential threat” from Transnistria, but security measures are being ramped up in that direction. This was echoed by State Border Guard Service representative Andriy Demchenko, who indicated there could be attempts by Russian sabotage groups and armored vehicles to break through from Transnistria, but there is no information about sea landings. 
 On May 20, Russia carried a major attack on Odesa, with a Russian “Shahed” drone striking a residential high-rise . According to emergency services, the drone penetrated the wall of the building on the twelfth floor, where an explosives technician later defused the device and safely removed it. 
 Just two days earlier, on May 18, during another Russian drone attack on the port in Odesa region, a Chinese ship in the Black Sea was struck. Ukrainian defense officials have commented on the incident.
external.title: Odesa authorities fortify city with trenches, bunkers, and barriers to deter Russian attacks

美国人口普查局数据显示，美国中西部地区的国内净迁移人口已从2022年净流出超17.5万人，转变为截至2025年6月的年度净流入约1.6万人，结束了长期的人口外流趋势。驱动这一转变的核心因素是该地区显著的住房可负担性，其房价中位数远低于全国均值，例如克利夫兰都会区23.7万美元的房价中位数远低于全国41.9万美元的水平；同时南部“阳光地带”就业增长的放缓，进一步增强了中西部的相对吸引力。
来源：华尔街日报

2026年2月，全球私募股权与风险资本的投资活动出现收缩，总投资额为398亿美元，环比下降19.4%，交易数量则环比减少33.5%至912笔，创下自2024年1月以来的单月最低记录。尽管出现月度下滑，但截至2月底年度累计投资额已达到891.6亿美元，与去年同期相比增长近一倍。
来源：标普全球

全球生育率在过去数十年间经历了普遍且持续的下降，目前全球约有三分之二的人口生活在总和生育率低于2.1的替代水平国家。在高收入国家，生育率在过去60年间已下降一半，以欧盟为例，其年出生人口从1961年的660万大幅减少至2024年的约350万。这一趋势与女性受教育程度和职业发展水平的提高密切相关，在缺乏相应社会支持和家庭责任分担机制调整的情况下，生育对女性职业生涯的干扰和个人成本的增加，成为其选择少生或不生的关键因素。
来源：金融时报

Das Bild zeigt einen Screenshot eines Social-Media-Beitrags (voraussichtlich Facebook), der eine ironische und widersprüchliche Interaktion darstellt.
​Hier ist die detaillierte Beschreibung des Inhalts:
​Der Original-Beitrag: * Der Post stammt von einer Seite namens "The Flat Earth Society" (einer Gruppierung, die die Theorie vertritt, die Erde sei eine Scheibe).
​Der Text des Beitrags lautet: "The Flat Earth Society has members all around the globe." (Deutsch: „Die Flat Earth Society hat Mitglieder überall auf dem Globus / rund um die Welt.“)
​Im Bild wurden die Worte "around" (unterstrichen) und "globe" (rot eingekreist) nachträglich markiert, um das sprachliche Eigentor hervorzuheben: Ein „Globus“ bezeichnet eine Kugel, was der Ideologie der Gruppe direkt widerspricht.
​Die Reaktion darunter:
​Eine verifizierte Seite namens "Physics-Astronomy.com" hat den Beitrag kommentiert.
​Der Kommentar lautet: "Say that again, but slowly" (Deutsch: „Sag das noch einmal, aber langsam“). Ein schwarzer Pfeil zeigt auf diesen Kommentar.
​Damit wird humorvoll darauf hingewiesen, dass die Flat Earth Society bei ihrer Formulierung unbewusst die Kugelgestalt der Erde anerkannt hat.
​Visuelle Qualität: * Das Bild ist ein abfotografierter Bildschirm (Moiré-Effekt/Pixelstruktur ist leicht erkennbar). Es ist leicht unscharf und hat den typischen Look eines viralen Memes, das mehrfach geteilt und komprimiert wurde.

external.description:
このX投稿の補足と解説

投稿内容の概要
投稿者: ウラディスラオ・ホセ・エルネスト・フランシスコさん（地理歴史・公民・経営学などに詳しいアカウント）
日時: 2026年5月26日頃
内容: セブン&アイ・ホールディングスの名誉顧問・鈴木敏文氏の死去（93歳）を報じるニュースを引用し、自身の所感を述べています。

主なポイント：
別の大学のAO入試（推薦・自己推薦型入試）で、鈴木敏文氏の著書が出題された記憶がある。
その内容はセブン-イレブンの創業や流通システムに関するものだった。
流通業界の変化が激しい中、鈴木氏の死去を「時代の一区切り」と感じている。

鈴木敏文氏とは（背景補足）
鈴木敏文氏は日本のコンビニエンスストア業界の生みの親と呼ばれる人物です。

主な功績:
  1970年代にイトーヨーカ堂と提携し、セブン-イレブン・ジャパンを設立。
  アメリカのSouthland Corporation（セブン-イレブン本家）からフランチャイズ権を取得。
  単品管理、発注・在庫の効率化、24時間営業、POSシステムの活用など、現代のコンビニの基盤を日本に根付かせた。
  小売・流通の革命を起こし、「コンビニエンスストア」という業態を日本で爆発的に普及させた立役者。

セブン&アイ・ホールディングスの実質的なトップとして長年君臨し、グループ全体の戦略にも深く関与していました。
著書も複数あり、特に流通・小売戦略や顧客視点のビジネス論が評価され、大学入試やビジネススクールで教材として使われることがあります（投稿者が言及しているAO入試の問題はその典型例）。

なぜ「時代の一区切り」なのか
鈴木氏の手法は高度成長期〜バブル期〜現代にかけての日本の小売流通を象徴するもの。
現在はネット通販（Amazonなど）、キャッシュレス、デジタル化、少子高齢化、24時間営業の見直しなど、環境が大きく変わっています。
創業世代の象徴的な人物が亡くなったことで、「アナログ+システム化」で急成長した日本のコンビニ黄金期の終わりを感じさせる出来事と言えます。

投稿者は経営学・流通に興味がある方らしく、単なる訃報としてではなく、ビジネス史・入試問題とのつながりを絡めてコメントしているのが特徴的です。
